blocks.text: I’m thinking about how an array can indeed be empty, and I want to remember to keep my responses clear and concise. I don't want to overwhelm anyone with unnecessary detail, so I'll focus on delivering just the right amount of information. It's all about striking that balance, right? I wonder if there's a way to ensure clarity without losing the essence of what I'm trying to convey. Let's see how I can do that effectively!
